3: Tender and only beloved beloved in the sight of my mother.
5: Forget it it not; neither decline from the words of my mouth.
6: Love her, and she shall keep thee.
7: And with all thy getting get understanding.
8: She shall bring thee to honour, when thou dost embrace her.
9: A crown of glory shall she deliver to thee.
10: And the years of thy life shall be many.
11: I have led thee in right paths.
12: And when thou runnest, thou shalt not stumble.
13: Keep her; for she is is thy life.
14: And go not in the way of evil men men .
15: Turn from it, and pass away.
16: And their sleep is taken away, unless they cause some some to fall.
17: And drink the wine of violence.
18: That shineth more and more unto the perfect day.
19: They know not at what they stumble.
20: Incline thine ear unto my sayings.
21: Keep them in the midst of thine heart.
22: And health to all their flesh.
23: For out of it are are the issues of life.
24: And perverse lips put far from thee.
25: And let thine eyelids look straight before thee.
26: And let all thy ways be established.
